traceability_metadata.description: Maps each agent to the PRD requirement IDs they are responsible for implementing or verifying. Agent 0 validates that each agent's artifacts trace back to these requirements.

01_ideation_agent.description: Market research, merchant datasets, business model — feeds into all PRD requirements as foundational input
01_ideation_agent.notes: Provides merchant catalog structure used across all downstream agents

02_requirement_agent.description: Product Requirements Document — defines all 103 requirements
02_requirement_agent.notes: Source of truth for all requirement IDs across the project

03_architect_agent.description: Full architecture design covering all 103 requirements, POC scope, cost models
03_architect_agent.notes: Blueprint guides implementation agents on HOW to build each requirement

04_prototype_agent.description: Proof of Concept with 8 pilot merchants — validates architecture feasibility
04_prototype_agent.notes: POC subset — full implementation handled by agents 07a-07d

05_program_mgmt_agent.description: Sprint planning, epic/story breakdown, MVP scope — ensures all requirements are scheduled
05_program_mgmt_agent.notes: Every user story must trace to a PRD requirement ID

06_infra_devops_agent.description: CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes, branch strategy, security workflows

07a_ui_agent.description: Responsive web and mobile UI implementation
07a_ui_agent.notes: All 24 UI/UX requirements + commerce UI elements

07b_api_agent.description: RESTful API endpoints, authentication, rate limiting, middleware
07b_api_agent.notes: All 13 API requirements + commerce payment/settlement API

07c_backend_db_agent.description: Database schema, indexes, RLS policies, seed data, migrations
07c_backend_db_agent.notes: All 26 backend/data requirements + 8 merchant microsite data requirements

07d_integration_agent.description: End-to-end integration of UI + API + DB — validates cross-cutting flows
07d_integration_agent.notes: End-to-end flow verification across all layers

08_qa_agent.description: Test automation, QA framework, E2E tests, defect tracking — verifies all requirements

09_production_agent.notes: Disaster recovery, performance, and infrastructure deployment requirements

10_tech_pub_agent.description: Documentation, help files, i18n, release notes
10_tech_pub_agent.notes: i18n/localization, API documentation, merchant guide documentation

11_customer_onboarding_agent.description: Merchant onboarding, CRM, support ticket system

12_marketing_agent.description: Social media campaigns, SEO, analytics tracking, growth automation

13_maintenance_agent.description: Autonomous monitoring, patch management, hotfix deployment

14_finops_agent.description: Cloud cost tracking, budget enforcement, LLM token monitoring

15_secrets_compliance_agent.description: Secrets scanning, compliance auditing, encryption enforcement
